results.title: UCSD Report Highlights Surge in Unprepared Freshmen Amid Debate Over Standardized Testing
results.description: A report from UC San Diego's Senate-Administration Working Group on Admissions highlights a surge in unprepared freshmen, linking it to grade inflation and the elimination of standardized testing in admissions.

results.title: Taylor Frankie Paul Exes Issue Statement Amid DCFS Custody Battle Over Children
results.description: Ex-husband Tate Paul and former partner Dakota Mortensen released a joint statement regarding DCFS involvement in custody proceedings involving Taylor Frankie Paul's children, emphasizing concerns about abuse and the need for coordinated agency response while criticizing Taylor's public remarks as minimizing the gravity of the situation.
